diagrams.title: Single Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows one base class (Animal) and one derived class (Dog) with arrow pointing from derived to base
diagrams.purpose: Visualize basic inheritance relationship and data flow

diagrams.title: Multiple Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows one derived class (TeachingAssistant) inheriting from two base classes (Teacher and Student)
elements: Arrows from TA to both bases
diagrams.purpose: Understand multiple inheritance syntax and class relationships

diagrams.title: Multilevel Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows inheritance chain: Vehicle → Car → SportsCar
diagrams.purpose: Visualize inheritance depth and constructor/destructor flow order

diagrams.title: Hierarchical Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows one base class (Shape) with multiple derived classes (Circle, Rectangle, Triangle)
elements: Multiple arrows from bases to single parent

diagrams.title: Diamond Problem
diagrams.description: Shows the diamond structure without virtual inheritance leading to duplicate Base class
elements: Two paths from MostDerived to Base
diagrams.purpose: Explain why virtual base class is needed

diagrams.title: Diamond Problem Solution
diagrams.description: Same as diamond but with virtual keyword on intermediate classes, showing single Base copy
elements: Single instance of Base in memory
One path from MostDerived to Base
diagrams.purpose: Show how virtual inheritance solves diamond problem
